name: vendor.myndhyve.ads-policy
description: MyndHyve ads.policy.check — built-in policy text-rule scanner. Detects claims (guarantees, income, superlatives), trademark mentions, prohibited content (before/after, deceptive urgency), discriminatory targeting. Caller-supplied placement text-limits + trust-guardrail results for fuller coverage; standalone for text-rule-only checks.
author: MyndHyve
